Moto On/Off - Google Sheets calendar setup
The Departures tab is the single source of truth for public calendar events.
The website reads this Sheet every 10 minutes, or immediately after /api/revalidate is called.
Only rows in Departures are public. Rows in Examples are ignored by the website.
Use exactly one of: open, low, sold_out.
Use exactly one of: USD, ARS, EUR.
Fill notes_es, notes_en, and notes_pt manually. Do not rely on automatic translation.
Use one of the values listed in the Slugs tab.
Share this Sheet with the Google service account email as Viewer.
